plugins.name: ft-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Free-threading migration toolkit for CPython C extensions. Finds thread-safety bugs (data races, unprotected shared state, unsafe API usage, lock discipline issues), plans migrations to free-threaded Python (PEP 703), triages ThreadSanitizer reports, generates concurrent stress tests for TSan, and produces readiness assessments. 10 agents, 7 scripts, 3 commands. Tree-sitter-powered C/C++ parsing.
